recommendations.title: Enhance ESG Disclosure to Maintain FTSE4Good Status
recommendations.description: Strengthen ESG disclosures aligned with BRSR and GRI frameworks to avoid SEBI scrutiny and maintain FTSE4Good inclusion, preventing potential fund outflows.
recommendations.profitability_link: Avoiding a 20-40 bps increase in cost of capital on ₹20,000 Cr market cap saves ₹40-80 Cr annually
recommendations.peer_benchmark: State Bank of India improved ESG ratings by publishing advanced disclosures attracting ₹3000 Cr ESG inflows

recommendations.title: Implement Quarterly ESG Governance Reporting
recommendations.description: Establish a robust process for SEBI quarterly corporate governance reports to ensure timely and accurate ESG disclosures, sustaining investor confidence.
recommendations.profitability_link: Prevents regulatory penalties and maintains investor trust, safeguarding ₹500 Cr in potential fund outflows

recommendations.title: Publish Comprehensive Scope 3 Emissions Report
recommendations.description: Develop and publish a detailed Scope 3 emissions report following TCFD recommendations to enhance transparency and attract ESG-focused investors.
recommendations.profitability_link: Potential to attract a 5-10% valuation premium on ₹20,000 Cr market cap, equating to ₹1000-2000 Cr uplift
recommendations.peer_benchmark: SBI's TCFD-aligned Scope 3 report led to ₹3000 Cr ESG inflows and rating upgrades

recommendations.title: Leverage ESG Narrative for Market Differentiation
recommendations.description: Develop targeted ESG communication campaigns highlighting FTSE4Good inclusion and transparency leadership to enhance brand trust and attract talent.
recommendations.responsible_party: Head of Investor Relations and Communications
recommendations.profitability_link: Improved trust can increase customer retention and reduce talent acquisition costs, saving ₹20-30 Cr annually

immediate_high.title: Enhance ESG Disclosure to Maintain FTSE4Good Status

immediate_low.title: Leverage ESG Narrative for Market Differentiation
